name: Diabetic Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg, Sucaryl solution, and milk to the margarine mixture. Stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the margarine mixture, stirring after each addition.
5. Mix in the vanilla extract, raisins, and rolled oats until evenly distributed.
6. Spoon the batter by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. You may substitute 1/4 cup margarine with an equal amount of unsweetened applesauce, or replace it with the pureed flesh of one medium banana.
